name: Infinite Antlion
name_jp: ジャイアント・メサイア
desc: Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, when an Insect monster battles: You can target 1 card you control and 1 card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinite Antlion" once per turn. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Insect monster from your hand or GY to this card as an Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK/DEF.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, when an Insect monster battles: You can target 1 card you control and 1 card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinite Antlion" once per turn. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Insect monster from your hand or GY to this card as an Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK/DEF.
eff: Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, when an Insect monster battles: You can target 1 card you control and 1 card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinite Antlion" once per turn. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Insect monster from your hand or GY to this card as an Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK/DEF.

action: Equips from the player's hand to itself
Equips from the player's Graveyard to itself
Grants effect to Equip Spell Card
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
